briefs.title: Summerland Added to Designated Accommodation Tax Zone Starting March 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC is adding the District of Summerland to its Designated Accommodation Area Tax list, meaning short-term accommodation providers there must now collect and remit (send in) this extra provincial tax.
briefs.action_required: Register to collect and remit BC's Designated Accommodation Area Tax if you operate short-term rentals in Summerland.

key_dates.label: BC Designated Accommodation Area Tax — Summerland inclusion takes effect
